carpet.title: Carpet Cleaning
carpet.heroText: For over 25 years, Shiny Rhino has been the professional carpet cleaning expert people trust to deliver the best carpet cleaning service available.
carpet.quoteTitle: Get Closer to a Cleaner Carpet
carpet.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
carpet.content: Our carpet cleaning process uses hot water extraction to remove dirt, allergens, bacteria, and stains from deep within your carpet fibers. Unlike surface cleaning methods, our process reaches the base of your carpet where the worst contaminants hide.

steps.title: Pre-Inspection
steps.description: We examine your carpet to identify problem areas, stains, and the best cleaning approach for your fiber type.

steps.title: Pre-Treatment
steps.description: Our advanced pre-spray breaks down embedded soiling and tough stains before the main cleaning begins.

steps.title: Hot Water Extraction
steps.description: Using our proprietary equipment, we inject hot water and cleaning solution deep into fibers, then extract everything along with the dirt.

features.title: Advanced Pre-Spray Breaks Down Soiling
features.description: Our specially formulated pre-spray loosens ground-in dirt and stains before extraction.

features.title: Remove Embedded Dirt, Allergens & More
features.description: Our process removes up to 99% of common household allergens from carpet.

features.title: Powerful Results with Proprietary Equipment
features.description: Truck-mounted equipment provides consistent heat and suction power.

features.title: Fast Drying Times
features.description: Most carpets are dry within 6-12 hours of cleaning.

faq.q: How long will it take to clean my carpets?
faq.a: Most homes take 1-3 hours depending on size. A typical 3-bedroom home averages about 2 hours.

faq.q: How long will it take for my carpet to dry after a cleaning?
faq.a: Carpets typically dry within 6-12 hours. We recommend good ventilation to speed drying.

faq.q: Do you move furniture?
faq.a: Yes, we move most standard furniture as part of the service. We ask that you move small, fragile, and valuable items beforehand.

faq.q: What method do you use for carpet cleaning?
faq.a: We use hot water extraction, which is the method recommended by major carpet manufacturers.

faq.q: Where can I find carpet cleaning services near me?
faq.a: Enter your zip code on our locations page or call 1-800-555-RHINO to find your nearest Shiny Rhino.

commercial.title: Commercial Carpet Cleaning
commercial.description: Whether it's a small office or a large commercial facility, Shiny Rhino provides customized carpet cleaning programs designed for your business needs. Our flexible scheduling minimizes disruption to your operations.

upholstery.title: Furniture & Upholstery Cleaning
upholstery.heroText: Upholstery can trap dirt, allergens and soils that wear down fibers and dull appearance. With upholstery cleaning from Shiny Rhino, your furniture will be refreshed and revitalized.
upholstery.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
upholstery.content: Professional upholstery cleaning from Shiny Rhino removes the dirt, allergens, and stains that regular vacuuming leaves behind. Our trained technicians assess each piece of furniture to determine the safest, most effective cleaning method.

steps.title: Fabric Assessment
steps.description: We test and identify your fabric type to determine the ideal cleaning method and solutions.

steps.title: Pre-Treatment
steps.description: Stains and high-traffic areas receive targeted pre-treatment to break down embedded soils.

steps.title: Deep Clean & Extract
steps.description: Our gentle yet thorough process cleans deep into upholstery fibers while preserving fabric integrity.

features.title: A Tailored Approach
features.description: Different fabrics require different methods. We customize our approach for each piece.

features.title: Remove Dirt and Allergens
features.description: Our cleaning removes allergens trapped deep in upholstery fibers.

features.title: Steam Cleaning Dry Within Hours
features.description: Most furniture is ready to use the same day.

features.title: Odor Neutralization
features.description: We don't just mask smells - we eliminate odors from pets, kids, and daily use.

faq.q: How long will it take for my furniture to dry?
faq.a: Most upholstered furniture dries within 4-6 hours depending on fabric type and ventilation.

faq.q: Can you steam clean upholstery?
faq.a: Yes, steam cleaning is one of several methods we use depending on your fabric type.

faq.q: How to clean upholstery?
faq.a: While regular vacuuming helps, professional deep cleaning is recommended every 12-18 months.

faq.q: How does Shiny Rhino clean upholstery?
faq.a: We assess the fabric, pre-treat stains, then use the appropriate method to deep clean without damaging the material.

commercial.title: Commercial Upholstery Cleaning
commercial.description: Keep your office furniture, waiting room chairs, and conference room seating looking professional. We offer flexible scheduling to minimize disruption to your business.

tile.title: Tile & Grout Cleaning
tile.heroText: Cleaning tile floors by hand is hard work. It's messy, uncomfortable and impossible to get the deep-clean results that come with professional tile and grout cleaning.
tile.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
tile.content: Over time, tile floors lose their luster as dirt and grime become embedded in grout lines and tile surfaces. Our professional tile and grout cleaning restores the original beauty of your floors using high-pressure cleaning and specialized solutions.

steps.title: Inspection & Pre-Treat
steps.description: We examine your tile and grout to identify the best approach, then apply a specialized alkaline cleaning solution.

steps.title: High-Pressure Cleaning
steps.description: Our high-pressure tool blasts away years of built-up dirt and grime from grout lines and tile surfaces.

steps.title: Seal & Protect
steps.description: We apply a professional-grade sealant to grout lines to prevent future staining and make maintenance easier.

features.title: High-Pressure Equipment
features.description: Our specialized tools clean deep into porous grout lines where mops can't reach.

features.title: Free Cleaning Demonstration
features.description: See the difference before committing - we'll clean a test area so you can see the results.

features.title: Stain-Resistant Grout Sealant
features.description: Our sealant creates a protective barrier that prevents future staining.

features.title: Restore or Change Grout Color
features.description: We can restore your grout to its original color or apply a new color entirely.

faq.q: How often should I have my tile and grout cleaned?
faq.a: We recommend professional cleaning every 12-18 months for most homes.

faq.q: Will cleaning damage my tile?
faq.a: No, our process is safe for all types of tile including ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone.

faq.q: How long does tile and grout cleaning take?
faq.a: Most residential jobs take 2-4 hours depending on the area size.

faq.q: Do you seal the grout after cleaning?
faq.a: Yes, grout sealing is available as an add-on service and is highly recommended.

commercial.title: Commercial Tile & Grout Cleaning
commercial.description: Restaurants, retail spaces, and office buildings with tile floors need regular professional cleaning to maintain appearance and hygiene. We offer scheduled maintenance programs.

hardwood.title: Hardwood Floor Cleaning
hardwood.heroText: When you sweep and mop to clean hardwood floors, you're not removing all dirt. Professional hardwood cleaning requires deep dirt extraction to protect and preserve your investment.
hardwood.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
hardwood.content: Hardwood floors are a beautiful investment that deserve specialized care. Our hardwood floor cleaning service uses a gentle yet effective process that removes embedded dirt, restores natural shine, and extends the life of your floors without the harsh chemicals that can damage wood.

steps.title: Dust & Debris Removal
steps.description: We start with thorough dust mopping to remove surface particles that could scratch during cleaning.

steps.title: Deep Clean
steps.description: Our pH-balanced solution safely loosens and lifts embedded dirt without damaging the wood finish.

steps.title: Buff & Protect
steps.description: We finish with a professional-grade wood floor conditioner that restores shine and provides a protective layer.

features.title: Specialized Equipment
features.description: Our hardwood-specific tools clean thoroughly without scratching or over-wetting.

features.title: Attention to Detail
features.description: We clean along baseboards, in corners, and in hard-to-reach areas.

features.title: Remove Dirt, Allergens and More
features.description: Our process extracts allergens and particles trapped between floorboards.

features.title: pH-Balanced Solution
features.description: Safe for all finished hardwood types including oak, maple, cherry, and more.

faq.q: Is your cleaning safe for all hardwood floors?
faq.a: Yes, our pH-balanced cleaning solution is safe for all types of sealed hardwood floors.

faq.q: How often should I clean my hardwood floors professionally?
faq.a: We recommend professional cleaning every 12-18 months, with regular sweeping and dusting in between.

faq.q: Will your process damage the finish?
faq.a: No, our gentle cleaning method is designed to protect and enhance your existing finish.

faq.q: How long does it take for hardwood floors to dry?
faq.a: Hardwood floors are typically dry within 1-2 hours after our service.

commercial.title: Commercial Hardwood Floor Cleaning
commercial.description: Keep your office, retail, or restaurant hardwood floors looking their best with our commercial cleaning programs. Flexible scheduling available for after-hours service.

rug.title: Area Rug Cleaning
rug.heroText: Vacuuming alone won't keep your area rugs free from dirt, dust and allergens. Professional rug cleaning keeps your rugs looking beautiful and extends their life.
rug.quoteTitle: Get Closer to a Cleaner Rug
rug.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
rug.content: Area rugs deserve specialized attention. Whether you have a hand-knotted Oriental rug, a delicate silk piece, or a durable synthetic rug, our trained technicians know exactly how to clean each type safely and effectively.

steps.title: Careful Inspection
steps.description: We examine fiber type, dye stability, and construction to determine the safest cleaning approach.

steps.title: Specialized Cleaning
steps.description: Using the appropriate method for your rug type, we deep clean while preserving colors and fibers.

steps.title: Grooming & Drying
steps.description: We groom the fibers for a uniform appearance and ensure proper drying to prevent mold.

features.title: Expert Assessment
features.description: Every rug is inspected for fiber type, colorfastness, and pre-existing conditions.

features.title: Free Demonstration
features.description: We'll clean a small test area first so you can approve the results.

features.title: Oriental & Fine Rug Specialists
features.description: Trained in handling delicate, valuable, and antique rugs.

features.title: Odor Elimination
features.description: Pet odors, smoke, and musty smells are neutralized at the source.

faq.q: Can you clean Oriental rugs?
faq.a: Yes, our technicians are specially trained in handling Oriental, Persian, and other fine area rugs.

faq.q: Do you pick up and deliver area rugs?
faq.a: Yes, we offer pickup and delivery for area rugs that benefit from in-plant cleaning.

faq.q: How long does area rug cleaning take?
faq.a: In-home cleaning usually takes 1-2 hours. In-plant cleaning may take 5-7 business days.

faq.q: Will cleaning shrink my area rug?
faq.a: No, our careful process and controlled drying prevent shrinkage.

commercial.title: Commercial Area Rug Cleaning
commercial.description: Hotels, restaurants, and offices with area rugs benefit from our professional cleaning to maintain appearance and extend rug life.

stone.title: Natural Stone Cleaning
stone.heroText: Natural stone floors won't come completely clean from regular mopping. Stone tile is incredibly porous, which means the surface absorbs stains and dirt over time.
stone.content: Natural stone surfaces like marble, granite, travertine, limestone, and slate require specialized cleaning knowledge. Our stone care experts understand the unique properties of each stone type and use appropriate methods to clean without damaging these beautiful surfaces.

steps.title: Stone Assessment
steps.description: We identify your stone type and any existing damage or staining to create a customized cleaning plan.

steps.title: Deep Clean
steps.description: Using stone-safe solutions and equipment, we extract deeply embedded dirt and stains.

steps.title: Seal & Protect
steps.description: We apply a professional sealant to protect your stone from future staining and wear.

features.title: Stone-Safe Solutions
features.description: Our pH-neutral cleaners are formulated specifically for natural stone surfaces.

features.title: Stain Removal
features.description: We can address many types of stains including water marks, etching, and organic stains.

features.title: Professional Sealing
features.description: Our sealant creates an invisible barrier against future staining.

features.title: Restoration Available
features.description: We offer honing and polishing services to restore the finish of worn stone.

faq.q: What types of stone do you clean?
faq.a: We clean marble, granite, travertine, limestone, slate, flagstone, terrazzo, and more.

faq.q: Is your cleaning process safe for polished marble?
faq.a: Yes, our stone-safe solutions and methods preserve the polish and integrity of marble.

faq.q: How often should natural stone be cleaned?
faq.a: Professional cleaning is recommended every 12-24 months, depending on traffic and use.

water.title: Water Damage Restoration
water.heroText: Is your home in need of emergency water remediation? Shiny Rhino is available 24/7 to dispatch trained crews specializing in water damage restoration.
water.content: When water damage strikes, every minute counts. Our rapid response team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to begin the water extraction and drying process. Quick action helps minimize damage, reduce restoration costs, and prevent mold growth.

steps.title: Emergency Response
steps.description: Our team arrives quickly to assess the damage and begin water extraction immediately.

steps.title: Water Extraction & Drying
steps.description: We use powerful extraction equipment and industrial dehumidifiers to remove water and moisture.

steps.title: Restoration & Cleaning
steps.description: Once dry, we clean, sanitize, and restore affected areas to pre-damage condition.

features.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
features.description: Day or night, our trained crews are ready to respond to your water emergency.

features.title: Minimize Damage & Dry Quickly
features.description: Fast response and powerful equipment reduce total damage and restoration costs.

features.title: Certified Specialists
features.description: Our water damage technicians are IICRC certified in water damage restoration.

features.title: Insurance Assistance
features.description: We work with your insurance company to streamline the claims process.

faq.q: How quickly can you respond?
faq.a: Our emergency teams are dispatched immediately and typically arrive within a few hours of your call.

faq.q: Do you work with insurance companies?
faq.a: Yes, we work directly with most major insurance companies and can help with the claims process.

faq.q: What should I do before you arrive?
faq.a: If safe, turn off water source. Move valuables to dry areas. Do not use electrical appliances in wet areas.

vehicle.title: Car, Boat & RV Cleaning
vehicle.heroText: Interior detailing and deep cleaning for your vehicles, boats, and recreational vehicles. Get that new car feeling without the new car price.
vehicle.quoteTitle: Get Closer to a Cleaner Ride
vehicle.quoteSubtitle: with an instant quote and online scheduling
vehicle.content: Your vehicle's interior deserves the same professional attention as your home. Our trained technicians use specialized equipment and solutions to deep clean carpets, upholstery, and floor mats in your car, boat, or RV.

steps.title: Interior Assessment
steps.description: We evaluate fabric types, staining, and special cleaning needs for your vehicle.

steps.title: Deep Extraction Clean
steps.description: Our truck-mounted equipment provides powerful suction to extract embedded dirt from vehicle interiors.

steps.title: Detail & Protect
steps.description: We address stains, odors, and apply protectant to keep your interior looking fresh.

features.title: Cars, Trucks & SUVs
features.description: Complete interior carpet and upholstery cleaning for all vehicle types.

features.title: Boats & Watercraft
features.description: Remove salt, mildew, and grime from marine upholstery and carpet.

features.title: RVs & Campers
features.description: Deep clean the living spaces of your recreational vehicle.

features.title: Odor Removal
features.description: Eliminate pet, smoke, and musty odors from vehicle interiors.

faq.q: Where do you clean vehicles?
faq.a: We can clean your vehicle at your home or business location.

faq.q: How long does vehicle interior cleaning take?
faq.a: Most vehicles take 1-2 hours. Larger RVs may take 2-4 hours.

about.title: Our Story
about.heroText: Learn about the team behind Shiny Rhino and our commitment to clean.
about.content: Shiny Rhino was founded with a simple mission: to provide the highest quality cleaning services with integrity and care. What started as a small local carpet cleaning operation has grown into a trusted name in professional cleaning services.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.text: We believe every home and business deserves to be clean and healthy. Our mission is to deliver exceptional cleaning results using safe, effective methods that protect both your spaces and our environment.

sections.title: Our Technicians: Students of Cleaning
sections.text: We know our state-of-the-art equipment is only as effective as the technician using it. That's why we train our technicians thoroughly in the methods and science of professional cleaning. Every Shiny Rhino technician is IICRC certified, background checked, and committed to delivering the best results.

sections.title: Made in America
sections.text: Our cleaning products are developed and manufactured right here in the USA. We take pride in creating professional-grade solutions that deliver powerful cleaning results while remaining safe for families and pets.

sections.title: Eco-Friendly Approach
sections.text: Shiny Rhino is committed to environmentally responsible cleaning. Our solutions are Green Seal certified, biodegradable, and free of harsh chemicals. We continually invest in the latest cleaning technology to reduce water usage and environmental impact.

products.title: Professional Grade Cleaning Products That You Can Use Yourself

items.name: Shiny Rhino Spot Remover
items.description: Professional strength spot and stain remover for carpets and upholstery. Tackles tough stains like wine, coffee, and pet accidents.

items.name: Hardwood Floor Cleaner
items.description: pH-balanced cleaning solution specifically formulated for finished hardwood floors. Safe for daily use.

items.name: Hardwood Floor Cleaner Kit
items.description: Complete kit includes our Hardwood Floor Cleaner plus a professional microfiber mop for easy application.

items.name: Odor Out Plus
items.description: Neutralize odors from pets, kids, and everyday life. Works on carpets, upholstery, and hard surfaces.

items.name: Neutral Tile & Grout Cleaner
items.description: pH-neutral formula safe for all tile and grout. Cuts through grease and grime without damaging surfaces.

items.name: Pet-Mess Solution Kit
items.description: Everything you need to handle pet accidents between professional cleanings. Includes spot remover and odor neutralizer.

items.name: Pet Hair Lifter
items.description: Professional-grade rubber brush that lifts pet hair from carpets, upholstery, and clothing.

items.name: Gift Certificate
items.description: Give the gift of clean! Shiny Rhino Gift Certificates are available in any whole dollar amount.

questions.q: How long will it take to clean my carpets?
questions.a: Most residential jobs take between 1-3 hours depending on the size. A typical 3-bedroom home takes about 2 hours.

questions.q: My carpet was cleaned, and now it has bubbles. What caused this?
questions.a: Carpet bubbling after cleaning can occur when the carpet backing absorbs moisture. This is usually temporary and resolves as the carpet dries completely. If bubbles persist, contact us.

questions.q: How long until my carpet is dry?
questions.a: Carpets typically dry within 6-12 hours. Good ventilation, fans, and air conditioning can speed up drying.

questions.q: Do you move furniture?
questions.a: We move most standard furniture items. We ask that you move small, fragile, and valuable items beforehand.

questions.q: What method do you use?
questions.a: We primarily use hot water extraction, the method recommended by major carpet manufacturers.

questions.q: Where can I find carpet cleaning near me?
questions.a: Enter your zip code on our locations page or call 1-800-555-RHINO.

questions.q: Why should I have protector applied?
questions.a: Carpet protector creates a barrier that resists soiling and staining, keeping your carpets cleaner longer between professional cleanings.

questions.q: How does your deodorizer work?
questions.a: Our deodorizer neutralizes odors at the molecular level rather than masking them with fragrance.

questions.q: How long will it take for my furniture to dry?
questions.a: Most upholstered furniture dries within 4-6 hours.

questions.q: Can you steam clean upholstery?
questions.a: Yes, steam cleaning is one of several methods we use depending on your fabric type.

questions.q: How often should I clean my couch?
questions.a: We recommend professional upholstery cleaning every 12-18 months, or more frequently for homes with pets or children.

questions.q: How often should tile and grout be professionally cleaned?
questions.a: We recommend professional cleaning every 12-18 months for most homes.

questions.q: Do you seal grout after cleaning?
questions.a: Yes, grout sealing is available and highly recommended to prevent future staining.

questions.q: Is your cleaning safe for all hardwood floors?
questions.a: Yes, our pH-balanced solution is safe for all types of sealed hardwood floors.

questions.q: How often should hardwood floors be professionally cleaned?
questions.a: We recommend every 12-18 months.

questions.q: What types of stone do you clean?
questions.a: We clean marble, granite, travertine, limestone, slate, flagstone, terrazzo, and more.

questions.q: Do you seal natural stone?
questions.a: Yes, sealing is included and protects your stone from future staining.

questions.q: Do you offer 24/7 emergency service?
questions.a: Yes, our emergency water damage team is available around the clock, 365 days a year.

questions.q: Do you work with insurance companies?
questions.a: Yes, we work directly with most major insurance providers.

questions.q: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), checks, and cash.

questions.q: Are your products safe for pets and children?
questions.a: Absolutely! We use eco-friendly, non-toxic, Green Seal certified cleaning solutions.

questions.q: Do you offer commercial cleaning services?
questions.a: Yes, we provide commercial cleaning for offices, restaurants, retail spaces, and more.
